common.unsavedChanges: You have unsaved changes. Leave this page and discard them?
common.actionFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: View and manage user accounts in this workspace.
users.name: Name
users.setPasswordHint: No password needed. The user will receive a welcome email with a secure link to set their own password before first sign-in.
users.unlockConfirm: Unlock "{{name}}"'s account? They'll be able to sign in again immediately.
users.emptyHint: Create the first user to get started.
users.emptyStatusHint: Users with this status will appear here.
users.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{name}}"? They will be soft-deleted and can no longer sign in.
users.resetPasswordConfirm: Send a password reset link to "{{name}}"? Their current password will stop working until they set a new one via the emailed link.
users.resetPasswordDone: A password reset link was sent to {{name}}.
users.systemUserHint: System users are protected and can't be deleted.
users.selfActionHint: You can't perform this action on your own account.
users.bulkDeleteConfirm: Delete {{count}} selected user(s)? They will be soft-deleted and can no longer sign in.
users.bulkDeleteSkipped: {{count}} system account(s) can't be deleted and were skipped.

table.selectAll: Select all rows on this page

roles.title: Roles
roles.subtitle: Define roles and the permissions they grant.
roles.name: Name
roles.emptyHint: Create your first role to start granting access.
roles.deleteConfirm: Delete the role "{{name}}"? Users assigned to it will lose its permissions.
roles.bulkDeleteConfirm: Delete {{count}} selected role(s)? Users assigned to them will lose those permissions.
roles.bulkDeleteSkipped: {{count}} system role(s) can't be deleted and were skipped.

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.subtitle: The full permission catalogue, grouped by module. Roles grant these codes.

tenants.title: Tenants
tenants.subtitle: Manage workspaces and their subscriptions.
tenants.name: Name
tenants.emptyHint: Create your first tenant to get started.
tenants.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{name}}"? This removes the workspace and its data.
tenants.bulkDeleteConfirm: Delete {{count}} selected tenant(s)? This removes each workspace and its data.

ipFilters.title: IP filters
ipFilters.subtitle: Allow or block access by IP address or CIDR range.

passwordPolicy.title: Password policy
passwordPolicy.subtitle: Complexity and lifecycle rules applied to passwords in this workspace.

delegations.title: Delegations
delegations.subtitle: Temporarily grant a subset of your permissions to another user.
delegations.emptyHint: Delegate some of your permissions to a colleague when you're away.
delegations.windowOrder: The end must be after the start.
delegations.noDelegatable: You have no permissions available to delegate.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.subtitle: Manage your language, appearance, notifications, and privacy.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Protect your account: two-factor, active sessions, devices, and more.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.subtitle: Require a one-time code from your authenticator app at sign-in.
twoFactor.scanHint: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, 1Password, …).
twoFactor.backupHint: Save these somewhere safe. Each code works once and they won't be shown again.

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.subtitle: Devices and browsers currently signed in to your account.
sessions.revokeAllConfirm: Sign out of every session? You may need to sign in again.

devices.title: Known devices
devices.subtitle: Trusted devices can skip two-factor at sign-in.

apiKeys.title: API keys
apiKeys.subtitle: Keys for programmatic access. Secrets are shown only once.
apiKeys.name: Name
apiKeys.secretHint: Copy this secret now — it won't be shown again.
apiKeys.rotateConfirm: Rotate "{{name}}"? The current secret stops working immediately.
apiKeys.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{name}}"? Any client using it will lose access.

social.title: Linked accounts
social.subtitle: Social accounts you can sign in with.
social.empty: No linked accounts. Link one by signing in with a provider.

dashboard.subtitle: Here's a quick way into the areas you can manage.
dashboard.securityHint: Manage your sessions, devices, and two-factor.
dashboard.gettingStartedHint: Set up and secure your account.
dashboard.activityEmptyDesc: Recent actions across your workspace will appear here.

departments.title: Departments
departments.subtitle: Organize your organization's department hierarchy.
departments.name: Name
departments.emptyHint: Create your first department to start building the hierarchy.
departments.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{name}}" and all of its sub-departments? This can't be undone.

auth.signInSubtitle: Enter your credentials to access the portal
auth.twoFactorSubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app, or a backup code
auth.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
auth.resetDone: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in.
auth.confirmEmailDone: Your email is confirmed. You can now sign in.
auth.checkEmail: If an account matches, you'll receive an email shortly.
auth.accountLockedHint: Too many attempts. You can request an unlock email.
auth.unlockSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you an unlock link
auth.unlockDone: Your account is unlocked. You can now sign in.
auth.unlockInvalidLink: This unlock link is invalid or has expired.
auth.confirmEmailFailed: We couldn't confirm your email. The link may be invalid or expired.
auth.resetInvalidLink: This reset link is invalid or has expired.

errors.title: Something went wrong
errors.Auth.InvalidCredentials: The email or password is incorrect.
errors.Auth.AccountLocked: Your account is temporarily locked after too many attempts. Try again later.
errors.Auth.EmailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email address before signing in.
errors.Auth.ForcePasswordChange: You must set your password before signing in. Use the link in the welcome email we sent you, or choose "Forgot password?" to get a new link.
errors.Auth.InvalidRefreshToken: Your session is invalid. Please sign in again.
errors.Auth.RefreshTokenExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.Auth.RefreshTokenReused: Your session was ended for security reasons. Please sign in again.
errors.Auth.SessionRevoked: Your session has been revoked. Please sign in again.
errors.Auth.InvalidVerificationToken: This link is invalid or has expired.
errors.Auth.PasswordNotCompliant: The password doesn't meet the required complexity rules.
errors.Auth.SocialEmailMissing: The provider didn't share an email address.
errors.Auth.SocialEmailNotVerified: Your email with the provider isn't verified.
errors.Auth.SocialExchangeFailed: Sign-in with the provider failed. Please try again.
errors.Client.NetworkUnreachable: Can't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
errors.Client.IpBlocked: Access from your network is not permitted.
errors.Client.RateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.Client.Unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to view this page.
errors.notFound: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.
